text:
# Quality Assurance Assistant  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025 – IBM internal  
Challenge:  
Nationwide’s Quality Assurance team struggle to manually check <5% sample of customer interactions.  
Manual sampling leaves a major blind spot for service levels and regulatory exposure.  
Developed Solution:  
Gen AI assistant to review transcribed calls to identify vulnerability and signals of complaints  
Ensure customer contact rectified if required and to inform service level improvements.  
60-70 users today – 100+ planned in scaled rollout  
logo  
Cases assessed through tool to date  
3600  
17 seconds  
91%  
Accuracy of issue identification  
Avg solution processing time versus avg 10-12 min.  call listening  
90 days  
Potential for time saved on current sample size. ~1750 days if decision for “100% sample”  
Thank You
name: Chunk 9/14

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A major insurance and financial services organization that engaged IBM to deploy an AI-driven quality assurance solution for its customer contact center operations.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025 – IBM internal
Nationwide’s Quality Assurance team struggle to manually check <5% sample of customer interactions.

raw_entities.name: Quality Assurance Assistant
raw_entities.description: An AI-powered application developed to automatically review transcribed customer calls, detect complaint signals and vulnerabilities, and trigger corrective actions to improve service levels.
context: # Quality Assurance Assistant
Developed Solution: Gen AI assistant to review transcribed calls to identify vulnerability and signals of complaints
Ensure customer contact rectified if required and to inform service level improvements.

raw_entities.name: Transcribed Call Review
raw_entities.description: The core technical function of the solution that ingests and processes recorded customer interactions to extract actionable insights without manual intervention.
context: Gen AI assistant to review transcribed calls to identify vulnerability and signals of complaints

raw_entities.name: Issue Identification
raw_entities.description: The analytical function that accurately flags service failures, vulnerabilities, and complaint indicators within customer interactions.
context: 91% Accuracy of issue identification

raw_entities.name: Customer Interaction Quality Assurance
raw_entities.description: The primary operational scenario where the AI solution is applied to monitor customer service quality, identify pain points, and drive service level improvements across contact channels.
context: review transcribed calls to identify vulnerability and signals of complaints
inform service level improvements

raw_entities.name: Regulatory Compliance Monitoring
raw_entities.description: The application of the solution to mitigate regulatory risks by ensuring customer interactions meet compliance standards and identifying service level blind spots.
context: Manual sampling leaves a major blind spot for service levels and regulatory exposure.

raw_entities.name: Rapid Issue Resolution
raw_entities.description: Significant reduction in the time required to process and resolve customer issues compared to traditional manual call listening.
context: 17 seconds Avg solution processing time versus avg 10-12 min. call listening

raw_entities.name: Time Savings at Scale
raw_entities.description: Projected operational time savings that would be realized if the AI solution scales to cover 100% of customer interactions instead of the current <5% sample.
context: Potential for time saved on current sample size. ~1750 days if decision for “100% sample”

raw_entities.name: High Accuracy Detection
raw_entities.description: The solution delivers a 91% accuracy rate in identifying customer issues, ensuring reliable detection of vulnerabilities and complaint signals.
context: 91% Accuracy of issue identification

raw_entities.name: Manual Sampling Limitation
raw_entities.description: The operational constraint of relying on manual review processes that restrict quality assurance coverage to less than 5% of customer interactions.
context: Nationwide’s Quality Assurance team struggle to manually check <5% sample of customer interactions.

raw_entities.name: Regulatory & Service Level Blind Spots
raw_entities.description: The business risk arising from incomplete manual sampling, which creates visibility gaps for both service quality metrics and regulatory compliance requirements.
context: Manual sampling leaves a major blind spot for service levels and regulatory exposure.

raw_entities.name: IBM Gen AI
raw_entities.description: The underlying artificial intelligence platform powering the Quality Assurance Assistant, enabling automated transcription review and issue detection.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025 – IBM internal
Gen AI assistant to review transcribed calls

raw_entities.name: Scalable AI Deployment
raw_entities.description: The solution's proven ability to scale from an initial pilot of 60-70 users to a planned rollout exceeding 100 users, demonstrating enterprise readiness.
context: 60-70 users today – 100+ planned in scaled rollout

raw_entities.name: Automated vs Manual Efficiency
raw_entities.description: The competitive edge of reducing issue processing time from 10-12 minutes (manual) to 17 seconds (AI-driven), highlighting superior operational speed.
context: 17 seconds Avg solution processing time versus avg 10-12 min. call listening

raw_entities.name: IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
raw_entities.description: An internal IBM demonstration event showcasing the Nationwide quality assurance use case and the performance metrics of the Gen AI solution.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025 – IBM internal

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The technology vendor and solution provider responsible for developing and deploying the Gen AI quality assurance assistant for Nationwide.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025 – IBM internal
